name: Meat Sauce Bolognese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet until crispy; remove and drain all but 2 tablespoons of fat.
2. Add onion, celery, carrot, and cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in butter and chicken livers. Brown lightly, then add ground beef round. Cook for 10-15 minutes, or until meat is well browned.
4. Season with salt, oregano, nutmeg, bay leaf, vinegar, tomato sauce, and boullion. Cover and simmer for half an hour.
5. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms in remaining butter. Add to the meat sauce along with wine. Remove the bay leaf. Simmer for another half hour.
Jeannie FROM: JEAN ALLEN (GRDG72B)
